findings.description: The candidate rule aggregates multiple highly specific, disparate visual and layout directives (typography fallback, color tinting percentages, alignment, and full lockup copy) under a single typography rule. This cluster must be split into distinct rules to preserve clarity and granular tracking.

split_rules.description: Set the 'YOU DESERVE MORE' headline in Agenda (digital live text) with Nunito Sans ExtraBold as the email fallback, always in ALL CAPS.
Set the letters 'D' (in DESERVE) and 'M' (in MORE) at approximately 40% tint of the headline color (Gold/Sunshine or Brand Blue).
Stack the headline as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.
Use the full lockup copy: 'YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.'
